description: Engineering-focused templates for diagramming system architectures, API endpoints, database schemas, and cloud infrastructure layouts to align development teams around clear technical blueprints

templates.name: System Architecture Diagram
templates.description: Full system architecture diagram with microservices, databases, message queues, load balancers, and data flow connectors

templates.name: API Endpoint Map
templates.description: API endpoint mapping with routes, HTTP methods, request/response schemas, authentication flows, and versioning

templates.name: Database Schema Diagram
templates.description: Entity-relationship diagram with tables, columns, data types, relationships, indexes, and migration notes

templates.name: Infrastructure Overview
templates.description: Cloud infrastructure layout with compute, storage, networking, CDN, CI/CD pipeline, and monitoring services
